content.content:
I found your dental appointment on your calendar:

- Title: Dentist Appointment  
- When: 2024-05-18, 09:00–10:00  
- Location: Downtown Dental Clinic  
- Event ID: 5  
- Status: confirmed

I can reschedule it — I just need one of the following from you:

1) A specific new date/time (e.g., "Move to 2024-05-25 at 10:00") — I’ll keep the same 1-hour duration unless you tell me otherwise.  
2) A preference window (e.g., "any morning the week of May 20" or "afternoons only") and I can propose 2–3 free slots from your calendar.  
3) A relative change (e.g., "push it back by 1 week" or "move it to the next available morning after May 18").

Also tell me:
- Do you want me to notify the clinic or anyone else when I reschedule? (I can send notifications to event participants.)  
- Keep the same location and duration? (Yes by default.)

Which option do you want?
